submit.notes: Submits via shared submitToGHL() helper -> single GHL inbound webhook. GHL routes on form_source.

compliance.division_line: Stairway Mortgage is a division of NEXA Mortgage LLC.
compliance.sms_consent_required_text: I Consent to Receive SMS Notifications, Alerts & Occasional Marketing Communication from company. Message frequency varies. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP to (954) 993-1625 for assistance. You can reply STOP to unsubscribe at any time.

lo_routing.description: Hidden attribution fields originally populated by GTM from a loan-officer-specific share link cookie. Assigns lead to the LO in GHL. No live LOs yet; test LOs = Kerry White and Jim Blackburn.
lo_routing.strategy: Read from URL query params first, then cookies, then empty. Pass through to GHL verbatim.

attribution_fields.description: Standard UTM + click-id + source tracking. Read from URL params / cookies, pass through.

slides.notes: Phone has a 'Verify Phone' OTP gate. PLACEHOLDER stub: accepts code 000000, sends no SMS, gates submission, stamps phone_verified in payload. Replace post-domain-switch with Twilio/GHL verify via serverless route.

slides.label: SMS Consent
slides.consent_text: I Consent to Receive SMS Notifications, Alerts & Occasional Marketing Communication from company. Message frequency varies. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP to (954) 993-1625 for assistance. You can reply STOP to unsubscribe at any time.

open_flags: Phone 'Verify Phone' button omitted — GHL native verification not portable to static site.
Original survey applied NO conditional logic between slides (linear next/prev). Confirmed from screenshots.
Currency fields were plain text in GHL — replicating as text with light formatting, not enforced numeric.
